instruction: Create and maintain Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for significant technical decisions. Use to document context, options considered, decision rationale, tradeoffs, and consequences in a durable, searchable format. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Create durable, searchable records of significant architectural decisions with full context and tradeoffs.  ## Rules of When to Write an ADR

workflow.action: Identify the decision — what problem is being solved, what is the trigger.
Document context — constraints, requirements, and forces driving the decision.
List options considered with pros and cons per option.
Record the decision with explicit rationale and tradeoffs accepted.
Document consequences — positive outcomes expected and risks introduced.
Store ADR in docs/decisions/ with sequential numbering and link from relevant code.

outputContract: Link map between ADR and affected code/systems.
Decision index for project ADR history.
